message:
feat(decision): integrate CVaR risk-sensitive control into decision outcome

Add risk_sensitive field to DecisionOutcome and expose
apply_risk_sensitive_control function to allow callers to apply
CVaR-based tail-risk adjustment after initial expected-loss decision.

This enables robot mode and other high-stakes scenarios to use
conservative decisions that minimize catastrophic outcomes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
